# Iterable Community Guidelines

Welcome to the Iterable Plaza Community! Here’s where you’ll find a buzzing community of marketing professionals from around the world with one common mission: driving omni-channel relevance at scale.

The community is made up of Iterable users, guests, and employees. It serves as your go-to destination for Iterable product know-how, peer-to-peer support and thought leadership on best practices. 

They say you’re only as good as your network. We’d love to see community members learn from each other and build their influence and profile on the Iterable Plaza Community. These house rules are here to ensure the community is valuable to you and serves as a platform where we can all become better together. These guidelines are part of our Iterable Community Terms of Use. Please make sure you’ve also read the Iterable Community Terms of Use for the terms that apply to your use.

#### Iterable Plaza Community House Rules

1. Be respectful.

We all want to share positive experiences in the community, so please be polite and considerate in your interactions with other members. Respect the time and attention it takes to post well thought out questions and answers. 

*   All opinions are welcome, but harassment, hate speech, discriminatory remarks, or personal attacks have no place here.
*   Treat others with the same professionalism you’d expect in return.
*   Please make sure to review section 2(b) of our Community Terms of Use for more information on acceptable use.

2. Be relevant.

The community is designed to provide a place for Iterable users to seek and receive help from other community members, so please keep your comments constructive and relevant to the topic board and thread. 

*   If you have a new question, start a new thread rather than interrupting a conversation.
*   Promotional, commercial, or spam content may be removed unless it belongs in a designated sharing area.
*   Please make sure to review section 2(b) of our Community Terms of Use for more information on acceptable use.

3. Share the love.

Help make the Iterable Plaza Community a richer place by sharing your Iterable expertise. You may have just the right answer that somebody else is looking for, so delight them by adding your insight to the conversation.

4. Be responsible.

You are solely responsible for your interactions with other community users. Please practice common sense and use good judgement when posting and/or interacting with others.

*   Do not post anything that would violate contractual agreements (copyright, trade secret, or nondisclosure agreements).
*   Do not share illegal, pirated, or harmful content.

5. Protect everyone’s privacy.

Don’t share anything about yourself, your business or that of any other community member that you/they would not want to be publically available. 

*   Never post personal information you receive in one-to-one communications or private messages without consent.
*   Respect confidentiality and boundaries.

6. Keep in mind, this is user-generated content.

You’ll find plenty of good advice, instruction and insight here but remember that you and your company’s situation, configuration and/or implementation may vary from that of another community member. Apply the same good judgment here that you would apply to information anywhere on the Internet.

#### Enforcement of Community Guidelines

Violations of these guidelines may result in content removal, temporary suspension, or permanent account deactivation depending on severity. Iterable reserves the right to enforce these rules at its discretion to maintain a safe and valuable community.

#### The Iterable Logo and Employees

You will notice that some community members are Iterable employees. Like you, they are members of the community around Iterable products, and we encourage them to share their knowledge and opinions here.

#### Moderation and Flagging

To keep the Iterable Plaza Community safe and welcoming:

*   Posts may be automatically flagged by AI-powered moderation tools for review.
*   Human moderators make the final decision on any action.
*   If you recognize any violation of these guidelines or our Community Terms of Use, please notify us within the community and let us know why you feel the content is inappropriate. If you have any questions about our guidelines, terms, or policies, let us know via community@iterable.com

By engaging on and contributing to the Iterable Plaza Community you agree to follow these rules as well as the full Iterable Community Terms of Use.
